name: @futarchy-interface/replay-harness-ui
description: UI-side interaction and fork harness for the Futarchy interface.

scripts.phase-status: node -e "console.log('Auto-qa harness: interaction and fork tiers. See auto-qa/harness/README.md');"
scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/architecture-sync.test.mjs tests/eth-call-inspector.test.mjs tests/fork-state.test.mjs tests/invariants-catalog.test.mjs tests/market-page-fixture.test.mjs tests/scenarios-by-route.test.mjs tests/scenarios-by-tier.test.mjs tests/scenarios-catalog.test.mjs tests/scenarios-chaos-matrix.test.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:interaction && npm run test:fork
scripts.replay: echo 'TODO Phase 5 — full chain↔api↔ui replay' && exit 1
